creator: dirk.meyer@dinoex.sub.org
text:
Hallo Martin Laabs,

> I reinstalled the png port. But the problem remains. I think it is a 
> missing include path since the error during compiling is the following:
> 
> --------:<------------
> make clean all
> [...]
> gccmakedep -f-  -- -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/local/include 
> -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/include 
> -I/usr/local/include    -DCSRG_BASED  -DFUNCPROTO=15 -DNARROWPROTO 
>         -DDOJPEG -DDOTIFF -DUSE_TILED_TIFF_BOTLEFT_FIX -DOG3 -DDOPDS 
>      -DDOPNG -DDOJP2K        -DDOCDIR=\"-L/usr/local/share/doc/xv\" 
> -DSYSCONFDIR=\"/usr/local/etc/\" 
> -DMGCSFXDIR=\"/usr/local/lib/X11\"    -- xv.c xvevent.c xvroot.c xvmisc.c 
> xvimage.c xvcolor.c xvsmooth.c     xv24to8.c xvgif.c xvpm.c xvinfo.c 
> xvctrl.c xvscrl.c xvalg.c     xvgifwr.c xvdir.c xvbutt.c xvpbm.c xvxbm.c 
> xvgam.c xvbmp.c      xvdial.c xvgraf.c xvsunras.c xvjpeg.c xvps.c xvpopup.c 
> xvdflt.c         xvtiff.c xvtiffwr.c xvpds.c xvrle.c xviris.c xvgrab.c 
> vprintf.c         xvbrowse.c xvtext.c xvpcx.c xviff.c xvtarga.c xvxpm.c 
> xvcut.c   xvxwd.c xvfits.c xvpng.c xvzx.c xvwbmp.c xvpcd.c        xvmag.c 
> xvpic.c xvmaki.c xvpi.c xvpic2.c xvvd.c xvmgcsfx.c      xvml.c xvjp2k.c 
> xvhips.c bggen.c vdcomp.c xcmap.c > .depend
> xvpng.c:36:21: error: pngpriv.h: No such file or directory
> ===>  Building for xv-3.10a_15
> [...]
> cc -O2 -fno-strict-aliasing -pipe -g -march=athlon64 
> -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/local/include 
> -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/include  -I/usr/local/include    -DCSRG_BASED 
> -DFUNCPROTO=15 -DNARROWPROTO          -DDOJPEG -DDOTIFF 
> -DUSE_TILED_TIFF_BOTLEFT_FIX -DOG3 -DDOPDS           -DDOPNG -DDOJP2K 
>    -DDOCDIR=\"-L/usr/local/share/doc/xv\"  -DSYSCONFDIR=\"/usr/local/etc/\" 
>            -DMGCSFXDIR=\"/usr/local/lib/X11\"   -c xvpng.c
> xvpng.c:36:21: error: pngpriv.h: No such file or directory
> xvpng.c: In function 'WritePNG':
> xvpng.c:494: error: dereferencing pointer to incomplete type
> [....]
> ------------:<------------------
> 
> The pngpriv.h is located in  /usr/local/include/libpng15/pngpriv.h but 
> neither the /usr/local/include/libpng15/ directory is not included in the 
> compiler arguments neither the file includes <libpng15/pngpriv.h>.
> 
> Best regards,
>   Martin
> 
> PS: I build all ports with WRKDIRPREFIX=/usr/tmp/portbuild - so maybe this 
> is the reason the port build on other systems but not on my.

"/usr/local/include/libpng15" should be included:

$ grep -r libpng /usr/ports/graphics/xv
/usr/ports/graphics/xv/Makefile:CFLAGS+=        -I${LOCALBASE}/include/libpng15

Did you override CFLAGS in /etc/make.conf?
If you do, please change there: "CFLAGS=" to "CFLAGS?="

kind regards Dirk

- Dirk Meyer, Im Grund 4, 34317 Habichtswald, Germany
- [dirk.meyer@dinoex.sub.org],[dirk.meyer@guug.de],[dinoex@FreeBSD.org]
http://people.freebsd.org/~dinoex/errorlogs/
